description_for_human: Get tomorrow's weather forecast for any city in the world. Free, accurate, updated hourly.
description_for_model: Provides tomorrow's and today's weather forecast for any city worldwide. Returns temperature (high/low/feels-like), precipitation probability, wind speed, UV index, sunrise/sunset, hourly breakdown, what to wear suggestions, and activity recommendations. Use city slugs like /london, /new-york, /singapore, /tokyo to access forecasts. Supports 50,000+ cities via dynamic geocoding.
